description:
The Open Source Alternative To Notion.

AppFlowy is an open source alternative to Notion.
You are in charge of your data and customizations.
Version 0.12.4 – 06/20/2026
Desktop
New Features
- Revamped row page comments with UI improvements and notifications support
- Added comments support in full row page mode
Bug Fixes
- Improved the find and replace logic
- Fixed Kanban board column colors not persisting after they were generated
- Fixed several tab management issues: the new tab button behavior, tab data not clearing when switching workspaces, and back/forward navigation incorrectly refreshing the sidebar
- Fixed icon color and display issues in the tab bar
- Fixed database visibility sync, filter refresh, and an error when deleting a row
- Fixed PDF embeds to fall back to links when they can't be previewed
Mobile
Bug Fixes
- Fixed Kanban board column colors not persisting after they were generated
- Fixed database visibility sync, filter refresh, and an error when deleting a row
- Fixed PDF embeds to fall back to links when they can't be previewed
Security Notice (Windows)
This Windows release is signed with a newly renewed code-signing certificate. Because Windows SmartScreen builds reputation per certificate, you may temporarily see an "unrecognized app" warning. This build is properly signed and safe — if prompted, select More info → Run anyway. The warning will clear as the certificate establishes reputation.
